seymas-eggplant-pickle-with-vegetables-l.name: Suma's Eggplant Pickle With Vegetables
instructions: 1. Cut the stems of eggplants into a large pot.
2. Add water and salt to cover the top and cook a stone.
3. Take it from January and drop the cover of the pot off.
4. Dismantle eggplants to the strainer and strain the water.
5. Take a roughly in the form of cabbage, spikebiber, tomatoes and caviar cube.
6. Add 1 tablespoon of salt and blend.
7. Cut the eggplants into two pockets.
8. Fill in the prepared vegetable mixture.
9. Clean the garlic and add two pieces to each eggplant.
10. Clean red peppers and cut into coarse strips and add them into eggplants.
11. 11. Quickly connect the eggplants around the eggplants with peninsula.
12. Directory of pickles into a large jar.
12. August Add 1 tablespoon of rock salt, 1 tablespoon of apple and grape vinegar with 1 tablespoon of apple.
14 July Mix well and pour it into the jar.
15. Cover the jar tightly and keep it in a cool and dry place for about 15 days.
16. You can also try the classic eggplant picker if you wish.

smores.name: S'mores
instructions: Heat marshmallow over an open flame until it begins to brown and melt.
Break graham cracker in half; sandwich chocolate between graham cracker and hot marshmallow. Allow marshmallow to cool a little before eating.

sailor-style-cod-traditional-recipe-tele.name: Sailor-style Cod - Traditional Recipe
instructions: Drain the clams in salt-tempered water. Dry the cod loins, pass them through flour and fry them on both sides in hot olive oil. Remove and reserve.

Na frigideira em que fritou o bacalhau, refogue a cebola, descascada e cortada em meias-luas, e os alhos picados. Adicione o pimento, limpo e cortado em tirinhas, tempere com sal e deixe cozinhar durante 10 minutos, mexendo de vez em quando.

Add the tomato pulp, the clams, washed and run, and some pyri, cover and let them open. Water with the wine and, when it evaporates, put the cod back together. When you're clean, sprinkle with cilantros and serve.

salep-recipe-lezzet.name: Salep Recipe
instructions: 1. Cold milk take in the pot.
2. Add dust salep and sugar to your car.
3. Do not put it on the body without mixing.
4. In medium fire, sing cook with string.
5. The mixture will start to be heated and to be a consistency.
6. Continue mixing until you get a dense and fluid consistency without allowing boiling.
7. Take part in salebi stove.
8. Pour the cup, pour the cinnamon and hot service.
9.  Afiyet olsun.

salsa-roja.name: Salsa Roja

ingredients.prep: guajillo, and/or pasilla chiles, stems and seeds removed

ingredients.item: Diamond crystal or 1 tsp. morton kosher salt; plus more

instructions: Combine 1 large white onion, halved, 4 medium plum tomatoes (about 12 oz.), halved, 1–2 serrano chiles, 4 garlic cloves, and 3 oz. dried ancho, guajillo, and/or pasilla chiles, stems and seeds removed, in a medium saucepan, using fresh vegetables to weigh down dried chiles. Pour in water just to cover. Bring to a boil, then remove from heat. Cover and let sit until dried chiles are rehydrated and fresh vegetables are softened, 20–25 minutes.

Using a slotted spoon, transfer vegetables to a blender; reserve soaking liquid. Add ½ bunch cilantro, tough stems trimmed, coarsely chopped, juice of 1 lime, 1½ tsp. Diamond Crystal or 1 tsp. Morton kosher salt, ½ tsp. ground cumin, ¼ tsp. ground cinnamon, and 1 cup reserved soaking liquid. Blend, starting on low speed and gradually increasing to high, until smooth, about 2 minutes. Taste salsa and add more salt if needed.

salted-chocolatetahini-bliss-balls-tupak.name: Salted Chocolate–tahini Bliss Balls (tupak E-khorma)
instructions: Line a rimmed baking sheet with parchment. Pulse ⅔ cup pistachios in a food processor until very coarsely chopped. Add dates, tahini, maple syrup, salt, and ¼ cup cocoa powder and process until mixture balls up and forms a mass around the blade.
Roll batter into ten 1-oz. balls (each about the size of a ping pong ball) and arrange on prepared sheet. Chill until firm, about 20 minutes.

Meanwhile, grind sesame seeds and remaining 1 Tbsp. pistachios with a mortar and pestle or chop with a sharp knife until finely ground and no large pieces remain. Transfer to a small bowl. Place remaining 2 Tbsp. cocoa powder in another small bowl.
Re-roll balls between your palms until smooth and round. Dip one half of each ball into pistachio-sesame mixture, then the other half into cocoa powder.
Return balls to baking sheet and keep chilled.
Do Ahead: Balls can be made 1 month ahead. Wrap each ball in plastic and transfer to a resealable bag. Keep chilled.

santiago-de-cubas-roast-pork-marinated-i.name: Santiago De Cuba's Roast Pork Marinated In A Garlicky Allspice-cumin _adobo_ (_cerdo Brujo_)

ingredients.item: Bitter orange juice (from about 6 oranges) or equal parts lime juice and orange juice
Sweet orange juice diluted with about 1/4 cup water

instructions: Place the garlic, salt, peppercorns, cumin, and allspice in a large mortar and pound to a paste with a pestle. Stir in the bitter orange juice. (You can also puree these ingredients in a blender or food processor.) Set aside.

Trim the skin from the inner part of the leg only. Wipe the meat clean with a damp cloth. Make several deep incisions all over the skinned portion and rub with the salt. Let rest for a few minutes. Rub the marinade all over the pork, pushing it into the gashes and between the meat and the skin. Cover with plastic wrap and refrigerate for 2 to 3 hours or a maximum of 12 hours. Wipe the marinade from the skin with a clean cloth.

Preheat the oven to 204°C. Place the pork in a roasting pan and bake uncovered, skin side up, for 3 to 4 hours. Check the roast often. As the pan juices evaporate, replenish them with a little of the diluted sweet orange juice. The pork is done when the skin is crackling and the juices run clear when the meat is pierced at the thickest part of the leg (about 71°C on a meat thermometer).

Remove the pork from the oven and lift it onto a cutting board, holding the bone with a cloth. With a sharp knife, remove the crisp skin and cut it into small serving pieces. Place them on a cookie sheet and set in the turned-off oven, uncovered (if you cover the crackling, it steams and gets soggy).
To deglaze the pan juices, place the roasting pan on the stove over medium heat and add the sherry, scraping up the browned bits with a wooden spoon.

Carve the pork and return to the roasting pan with the pan juices to keep the meat moist and flavorful. Pork dries out easily, so if you must hold it for more than 30 minutes, cover the pan with aluminum foil and return it to a warm oven.

sauteed-apples.name: Sautéed Apples
instructions: Melt butter in a large skillet or saucepan over medium heat.
Add apples and cook, stirring constantly, until almost tender, 6 to 7 minutes.
Mix water and cornstarch together in a small bowl until cornstarch is dissolved; pour over apples. Stir in brown sugar and cinnamon. Bring to a boil for 2 minutes, stirring occasionally.
Remove from heat and serve warm.

sauteed-leeks-in-butter-and-white-wine.name: Sautéed Leeks In Butter And White Wine
instructions: Cut leeks about 1/4 inch above the roots and inspect for any soil. If soil is found, make another cut about 1/4 inch above the first one.
Trim away the dark green sheaths, and again, inspect for soil. Tear away the outer layer of the white part of the leek, as it will be tough. Clean and reserve sheaths for seasoning, if desired.

Cut leeks lengthwise, making narrow cuts, about 1/4 inch wide (julienne cut). If any soil is found, place cut leeks in a colander and submerge in a bowl of water. Swish gently, allowing any sediment to settle to the bottom. Remove leeks from the water, drain, and pat dry with paper towels.
Melt 2 tablespoons butter in a non-stick skillet over medium heat until foamy. Add leeks and cook, stirring constantly, about 4 minutes. Pour in wine and cook until leeks are tender, about 1 minute.
Remove from heat and stir in remaining butter. Season with salt and garnish with fresh parsley.

sauteed-pasta-recipe-with-cream-comedera.name: Sautéed Pasta Recipe with Cream
sauteed-pasta-recipe-with-cream-comedera.original_name: Receta de pasta salteada a la crema

ingredients.item: 400 gr de pasta corta  (puede ser macarrones, farfalle o coditos )

instructions: Warm up a frying pan. Once tibia, cut the tocinet into small notebooks and pits for 2-3 minutes till they are crocant.
Then pour the milk cream. Fitted with salt and pepper to taste. Mix and finish cooking for another 2 minutes. Turn and put them out.
Toma los pimientos y cebolla, corta en tiras medianas. Trocea el ajo.
Ahora, cocina la pasta siguiendo las instrucciones del empaque. Procura que te quede con la textura ideal.
Mientras la pasta se hace, calienta una cazuela grande y derrita la mantequilla.
Agrega la cebolla, los pimientos y el ajo. Mezcla y cocina por 3 minutos.
Baja el fuego de la cazuela.
When the dough is ready, it scattering and incorporates into the casserole. Add salt and pepper to your taste, mix and leap for 3 minutes.
After that time, pour the milk cream, mix and cook for another two minutes while continuing to move.
Turn off and serve hot. Enjoy!

savoy-argiro.name: Savoy
instructions: In the mixer's bowl, add the whites along with the salt and beat at medium speed until the mixture starts making peaks.
Add the crystalline sugar and continue hitting at moderate speed until we have a shiny and tight meringue.
In another bowl, beat the icing sugar with the yolks at high speed until they become like a nice off-white, light cream.
Add the liquid vanilla and a large spoonful of the beaten meringue.
Mix with the mixer to integrate.
Stop the mixer and add the rest of the meringue.
Mix around and make sharp moves so that the whole meringue is incorporated.
Finally sift the flour over the mixture and by making gentle circular movements incorporate the flour fully.
Add the mixture to a pastry bag.
In a baking pan, add parchment paper and cut with the pastry bag long-savage.
Sprinkle the surface with some crystalline sugar.
Bake in a well preheated oven at 120o C in the air in the middle grill for about 30 minutes.

screw-pasta-recipe-with-chicken-comedera.name: Screw Pasta Recipe With Chicken
screw-pasta-recipe-with-chicken-comedera.original_name: Receta de pasta tornillo con pollo

ingredients.item: 200 gr de pasta tornillo o fusilli

instructions: It starts the recipe, cooking the screw dough and following every step for its cooking, respecting the times. Just get him to have his dente.
Mientras se cocina, toma las pechugas de pollo y corta en cubos o tiras.
It heats a frying pan with olive oil and dors chicken breast cut for about 5 minutes.
Once they are golden, put out, get out of the fire and reserve.
Ahora, mezcla la leche con las dos cucharadas de harina de trigo hasta que se diluya.

Calienta un wok u olla y derrite la mantequilla, agrega la leche junto la harina y mezcla inmediatamente. Sazona con sal y pimienta, mezcla. Cocina por 5 minutos hasta que tome un poco de consistencia.
Pasado ese tiempo, incorpora la leche evaporada y las dos cucharadas de pasta de tomate. Mezcla y cocina por 3 minutos.
Proceed and incorporates chicken and some parmesan cheese, mix and cook for another 5 minutes till you have a good thick sauce.
Una vez lista, agrega esta salsa a la pasta y mezcla muy bien sin que se desmorone el tornillo. Apaga.
Serves hot. He's with cheese and parsley.
Enjoy!

seafood-juvetsi-argiro.name: Seafood Juvetsi
instructions: Clean the shrimp, keep the heads for the broth and the body.
Boil the octopus in the seafood broth for more flavor, to reduce the time to the final cooking.
Heat the olive oil in a medium pot.
Sauté the shripp heads for 2′-3′′.
Add the octopus and garlic whole with the peel.
Add the onion to think pieces the leek and Carrot whole. Sauté for 3′-4′ to lightly brown the onion.
Add the bay, parsley branches and pepper beans.
Add the wine and mix. Let the alcohol evaporate.
Add the water and let it boil.
Boil for 30’ over medium heat until the octopus boils.
When it boils, remove and slice. Cover it and keep it warm.
Dry and keep the broth, keep it warm.
Heat the olive oil in a pot.
Add the cleaned stripes and sauce for 1’ to change color.
Place them in bowls, cover them and set aside.
In the same oil, add the finely chopped onion and the finocchio in very thin slices.
Sauté for 3’-4’, stringing to caramelize onion and flint.
Add the garage and sauce for 1’, add the tomato paste and rub it on the base of the pot.
Add the ouzo and mix.
Add the barley and mix.
Add the tomatoes, octopus and broth and mix.
Add some salt and pepper.
Boil on low heat for 5′-6′ stirring.
Add the shrimps and bottle for 2′.
We control salt and pepper.
Finally, sprinkle with some olive oil and sprinkle with chopped parsley.
When it comes out of the fire, it must be juicy.
Let it stand for 2′-3′′ out of fire and guard.
Garnish each dish with some parsley and lemon quarters.

seared-squash-and-halloumi-burgers.name: Seared Squash And Halloumi Burgers
instructions: Trim ends from squash. Cut crosswise into 3”-long cylinders; cut cylinders lengthwise into ¼”-thick planks. Spread out on a kitchen towel and sprinkle lightly with salt. Let sit 10 minutes.
Meanwhile, slice Halloumi into ½”-thick slabs roughly the width of the buns (about 3” squares).
Whisk garlic, pickle juice, honey, and a small pinch of salt in a small bowl; season generously with pepper. Set dressing aside.

Heat 2 Tbsp. oil in a large nonstick skillet over medium-high. Pat squash dry. Working in 2 batches, cook squash in a single layer, turning once or twice and adding another 1 Tbsp. oil between batches if needed, until deeply browned and charred on both sides, about 5 minutes. Transfer squash to a shallow bowl. Pour reserved dressing over and gently turn squash to coat.
Wipe out pan and return to medium heat. Toast buns, cut side down, in pan until golden, about 3 minutes. Transfer to plates.
Increase heat to medium-high. Pat Halloumi dry; cook, turning once and pressing down lightly, until browned and starting to soften and melt, about 2 minutes.
Distribute Halloumi among bottom buns. Top with pickled jalapeños and basil, then with squash. Close with bun tops.

sedation.name: Sedation
instructions: Fill a pint glass with ice, and pour in the vodka, amaretto, peach schnapps, coconut rum, and melon liqueur; stir.
Pour in the orange juice and pineapple juice.
Float the cranberry juice on top.
Garnish with a lemon twist.

semolina-halva-recipe-with-pistachio-lez.name: Semolina Halva Recipe With Pistachio
instructions: 1. Take the butter into a large pan and add the tip to the car.
2. Provide light pinkness of the sun, string with sustring with meat.
3. Take the color you want to mmic & add dust nuts to the car and mix it once.
4. Add sugar and make the mixture homogeneous.
5. Milk and water circulation addition,then the gold of the space
6. When the mixture starts boiling, close the stove and keep cooking by stirring with s&uuml for 5 minutes without capping.
7. Finally close the cover of the ceiling and aka&ccedil of the halva; make the rest of minutes and serve.
8.  Afiyet olsun.

sesame-creme.name: Sesame Crème

ingredients.item: . diamond crystal or 1 0.75 tsp. morton kosher salt

instructions: Bring oil and ½ cup sesame seeds to a simmer in a small saucepan over medium heat. Cook, swirling pan constantly, until seeds are golden, about 2 minutes. Transfer oil and seeds to a small bowl and let cool; reserve saucepan.
Bring remaining 1 cup sesame seeds, salt, and 1 cup water to a boil in reserved saucepan over medium heat; cook 2 minutes. Drain seeds in a fine-mesh sieve; let cool.

Combine garlic, lemon juice, and boiled sesame seeds in a blender and blend on high speed until a coarse purée forms. Add sesame seeds in oil, Allium Confit, and 1 cup ice water and blend on high speed, adding more ice water a little at a time if needed, until very smooth and thick. Season Sesame Crème with salt and pepper.
Do ahead: Sesame Crème can be made 3 days ahead. Cover and chill.

sheet-pan-meatloaf.name: Sheet Pan Meatloaf

ingredients.item: Salt and freshly ground black pepper to taste

instructions: Preheat oven to 191°C (190 degrees C).
Combine ground beef, eggs, bread crumbs, onion, 2 tablespoons BBQ sauce, Worcestershire sauce, garlic powder, salt, and pepper in large bowl and mix by hand.
Line a sheet pan with foil and spray with cooking spray. Shape meatloaf mixture evenly into a rectangular shape.
Bake in the preheated oven for 45 minutes. Brush with remaining BBQ sauce (or more as needed) and bake until internal temperature reaches 165 degrees C (73 degrees C), about 15 more minutes.
Slice meatloaf and serve with extra BBQ sauce if desired.

shrimp-scampi-pasta.name: Shrimp Scampi Pasta
instructions: Thaw that shrimp! Place unopened 1-lb. bag of shrimp in a large bowl and fill with cool water. Place a heavy plate on top to submerge until thawed, about 45 minutes. If you're the kind of person who actually thinks about dinner more than a few hours before you're going to make it, you can also let the shrimp thaw overnight in the fridge. Alternatively, if you're in a hurry, take the shrimp out of the bag and let them soak in a big bowl of cold water—they'll be ready in about 15 minutes. However you thaw them, make sure to pat them dry before proceeding. Season shrimp with 1 tsp. salt. Let sit until ready to use. While all that's happening, bring a large pot of salted water to a boil.

This dish comes together quite quickly, so you're going to want to have all of your prep done before you start cooking. Peel 1 medium onion, then finely chop so that all pieces are about the size of lentils. Transfer to a medium bowl. Using a Microplane, grate 5 garlic cloves right into bowl. Finely grate zest of ½ lemon right into bowl. Coarsely chop 1 cup parsley leaves with tender stems; transfer to a separate small bowl and set aside.
Heat ¾ cup panko, 2 Tbsp. olive oil, and ¼ tsp. salt in a large Dutch oven over medium, stirring to coat panko.

Grate remaining 2 garlic cloves into pot and stir to combine. Cook, stirring often, until panko is golden brown, 3–4 minutes. Transfer panko mixture to a small bowl. Let cool. Wipe out any panko stuck to bottom of pot.

Heat 2 Tbsp. olive oil in pot over medium-high until just beginning to shimmer and you can see wisps of smoke. Cook shrimp, undisturbed, until golden brown on the underside, 2–3 minutes. Turn with tongs and continue to cook until shrimp is barely cooked through, about 15 seconds longer (the shrimp will keep cooking as it sits, and we’re going to add them back into the pot later so they’ll get a chance to finish cooking there—err on the side of undercooked). Transfer shrimp to a plate.

Add onion mixture, 4 Tbsp. butter, 1 tsp. salt, and ½ tsp. red pepper flakes to pot and cook over medium-low heat, stirring frequently, until very fragrant and softened but not browned, about 2 minutes.

Add ¾ cup dry white wine and bring to a simmer. Cook, stirring occasionally, until most of the liquid evaporates, some of the harsh alcohol scent cooks off, and sauce is thick and glossy, 2–3 minutes. Remove from heat while you cook the pasta.
Drop 1 lb. fettuccine in boiling water and set a timer according to package directions for al dente. Scoop out 1½ cups pasta cooking liquid.
Pull off and discard tails of shrimp while pasta cooks, then cut each shrimp into 3 pieces.

Drain pasta and add to Dutch oven along with reserved pasta cooking liquid and remaining 4 Tbsp. butter and 2 Tbsp. olive oil. Cook over medium heat, stirring often, until well coated and glossy, about 3 minutes.
Remove pot from heat and stir in shrimp and reserved parsley.
Cut 1 lemon in half and squeeze juice into pot (it should be about 2 Tbsp.), stirring to combine. Taste and adjust seasoning for salt. Cut remaining lemon into wedges for serving.
Divide pasta among bowls. Drizzle with more olive oil. Top with reserved panko mixture. Serve with lemon wedges alongside.

shrimp-with-ancho-butter-sauce.name: Shrimp With Ancho Butter Sauce

ingredients.prep: such as nam pla or nuoc nam

ingredients.item: Kosher salt and freshly ground black pepper
Finely chopped fresh flat-leaf parsley and crackers or toasted country-style bread

instructions: Place chiles de árbol and ancho chiles in a medium bowl and cover with boiling water; cover bowl and let stand 30 minutes. Drain, reserving ½ cup liquid. Remove stems and seeds from chiles; discard (leave in some seeds for more heat, if desired).

Meanwhile, heat a small cast-iron or other heavy skillet over high heat. Add onion and garlic and cook, stirring occasionally, until softened and lightly charred, 8–10 minutes; peel. Purée onion, garlic, chiles, fish sauce, sugar, and ¼ cup soaking liquid in a blender until smooth; season with salt.

Heat 2 Tbsp. oil in a small saucepan over medium-high heat. Add garlic and cook, stirring often, until softened (do not let brown), about 3 minutes. Add ½ cup ancho chile paste (reserve remaining paste for another use) and cook, stirring often, until fragrant, about 2 minutes; add cream. Add butter piece by piece, whisking after each addition until emulsified. Once sauce has thickened, mix in lime juice by teaspoonfuls; season ancho butter sauce with salt and pepper.

Heat remaining 2 Tbsp. oil in a large cast-iron or other heavy skillet over high heat. Season shrimp with salt and pepper and, working in batches, cook until shells are golden brown and shrimp are opaque in the center, about 3 minutes per side. Transfer to a large bowl, add warm sauce, and toss to coat; season with salt, pepper, and more lime juice, if desired.
Divide shrimp and sauce among bowls, top with parsley, and serve with crackers alongside.

sicilian-style-eggplants-comedera.name: Sicilian-style Eggplants
instructions: Cortamos las berenjenas en ruedas de 1/5 cms. Las sumergimos en agua con una cucharadita de sal durante 5 minutos. Luego las ponemos a colar hasta que pierda toda el agua.
In a frying pan with medium heat with some oil we put to golden the eggplants about 30 seconds on each side.

In another frying pan with medium / low heat, we put onion next to the pepper minced into very small cubes and a cup of tomato purée, let a salsa be made and put oregano and salt to taste. Don't stop scrubbing.

slow-cooker-chicken-and-apples.name: Slow Cooker Chicken And Apples

ingredients.item: Salt and ground black pepper to taste

instructions: Season all over inside of chicken with salt and black pepper; place whole apple inside cavity. Place chicken into a slow cooker, breast-side down; pour apple juice around chicken.

Cover slow cooker. Cook on Low until chicken is no longer pink at the bone and the juices run clear, 4 to 6 hours. An instant-read thermometer inserted into the thickest part of the thigh, near but not touching the bone, should read 74°C (74 degrees C). Transfer chicken to a cutting board, cover with a doubled sheet of aluminum foil, and rest in a warm area for 10 minutes before slicing.

smoothie-with-spinach-argiro.name: Smoothie With Spinach

ingredients.item: 2 cup baby spinach or half kale spinach
2 cup baby spinach or half kale spinach

instructions: Add all our ingredients to the blender and grind them for smoothie with spinach.
Vegetables are rich in vitamins, fibers and will give perfect green color to your morning smoothies.
Pineapple, orange, honey and banana will give their sweets to healthy smoothie with vegetables and fruits.
Frozen fruit will give “body” to the smoothie.
The yogurt will give you the necessary protein for the start of your day.
The seeds will make you saturate and ease your appetite for food.
You'll be full by the time next meal.
Feel free to play with the materials and adapt them to the fruits you love or have at home.
Do you want more easy recipes for easy and healthy fruit smoothies? Find them all here!

snap-pea-and-cabbage-slaw.name: Snap Pea And Cabbage Slaw
instructions: Whisk oil, lemon juice, and honey in a large bowl; season with salt and pepper. Add cabbage, snap peas, parsley, and mint and toss to combine.
DO AHEAD: Vegetables can be cut and dressing can be made 8 hours ahead. Cover and chill separately. Toss vegetables and dressing together just before serving.

soletilla-melindros-or-savoiardi-sponge-.name: Soletilla, Melindros, Or Savoiardi Sponge Cakes
soletilla-melindros-or-savoiardi-sponge-.original_name: Bizcochos de Soletilla, Melindros, o Savoiardi caseros
instructions: We purify the oven at 200 ° C heat up and down we divide the yolks from the clear On one side we mount the clear with an electrical rods and a pinch of salt until they have a firm point.

In another bowl we beat the yolks with the sugar till they whittle. We add the steamed flour with the chemical yeast and mix with wrapped movements. Last and little by little we put the clear assembled with the earlier blend. We can have a tablespoon of clear assembled and put together without fear, to lighten the mixture, and the rest will be added little by little with care with wrapped movements from bottom up.

We cut two plates of oven with baking paper and with the help of a pastry sleeve we form about 3 cm of mass strips and we powder with sugar glas just before inserting the sunscreen biscuits into the oven.

We baked for about 13-15 minutes at 180 ° C heat up and down, till the Sunflower biscuits are slightly golden. After time, we withdraw from the oven and let them cool onto a grid We parate with care the sunscreen biscuits from the oven paper.
soletilla-melindros-or-savoiardi-sponge-.category: Easy Beer Recipes, Home Stretch Recipes

solianka-russian-beef-soup.name: Solianka (russian Beef Soup)

ingredients.item: Salt and ground black pepper to taste

instructions: Soak mushrooms in water in a small bowl until tender, 20 to 30 minutes. Drain mushrooms, reserving soaking water.
Melt 1/4 cup butter in a large pot over medium-high heat. Sauté onions, veal, ham, sausage, and rehydrated mushrooms in melted butter. Add stock and mushroom water; bring to a boil.
Make a bouquet garni by tying bay leaves and peppercorns tightly in cheesecloth. Add bouquet garni, marinated mushrooms, pickles, and capers to soup. Reduce heat and simmer for 10 to 15 minutes.

Melt remaining 1/4 cup butter in a skillet. Add tomatoes and tomato paste and cook for 2 to 3 minutes, then add flour and cook for 2 to 3 more minutes. Stir 1 cup soup into the skillet, then pour mixture back into the soup pot.
Add olives, dill, pickle juice, garlic, paprika, and marjoram. Season with salt and black pepper; simmer for 10 to 15 minutes.
Remove the pot from heat and discard bouquet garni. Adjust seasonings and garnish servings with dollops of sour cream and lemon slices.

sophies-shepherds-pie.name: Sophie's Shepherd's Pie
instructions: Preheat the oven to 204°C (200 degrees C).

Place the potatoes into a saucepan and fill with enough water to cover. Bring to a boil, then cook over medium heat until tender enough to pierce with a fork, about 10 minutes. Drain and mash with butter and milk to your desired texture.

Meanwhile, crumble the ground lamb into a large skillet. Cook and stir until no longer pink. Season with Worcestershire sauce and beef bouillon. Add the mushrooms and onion; continue to cook and stir until tender. Transfer the contents of the skillet to a large casserole dish.

Mix the baked beans, diced tomatoes, gravy mix and carrots in with the lamb. Dollop big blobs of mashed potatoes over the top and carefully spread evenly to cover the entire top. Rake over it with a fork to create a crispy texture on top when it browns.
Bake for 10 minutes in the preheated oven, until the top is browned and crisp.

sous-vide-pork-belly.name: Sous Vide Pork Belly

ingredients.item: A sous vide machine; a 1-gallon vacuum-sealable or resealable plastic bag

instructions: Clip (or stand) sous vide machine to a tall, large pot. Fill pot with warm water to height according to manufacturer’s instructions (keep in mind that pork when added will cause water to rise).
Cut pork belly crosswise into 2"-wide strips (imagine really thick bacon). Place pork belly, scallions, honey, soy sauce, and sambal oelek in bag and turn to coat.

Vacuum seal or partially close resealable bag, getting as much air out as possible to keep bag from floating, and place in water bath. If using a resealable plastic bag, push down into water to submerge (this will push more air out of the bag) and fully close. To ensure proper cooking, contents of the bag need to be completely submerged in water. Turn on machine and heat water to 165°.

Using a small clip, secure top edge of resealable bag to rim of pot, positioning it opposite the machine’s water outlet; as the water circulates, it will help keep the bag submerged. If using a vacuum-sealed bag, you may need to set a small plate on top to prevent floating. Cook pork belly, maintaining water bath at 165°, at least 8 hours and up to 16 (letting it cook overnight is ideal, but you can start it in the morning for dinner later). Remove bag from water bath and let pork belly rest in bag 15 minutes (this lets the pork absorb some of the juices).

Remove pork belly from bag and pat dry with paper towels. (You can also save the liquid left in bag and use it as a dipping sauce or for making stir-fry.) Heat a large cast-iron skillet over medium-high until very hot. Add oil and cook pork belly on all sides until browned and crisp (it happens fast, so don’t walk away), 1–2 minutes total. The honey will help the meat brown quickly. Transfer to a platter and serve.

Do Ahead: Pork can be cooked in water bath 4 days ahead. Keep sealed in bag and chill, or freeze up to 1 month. Reheat with sous vide machine at 100° until warmed through, about 1 hour, before searing.

southwest-fiesta-dressing.name: Southwest Fiesta Dressing
instructions: Stir yogurt, sour cream, ketchup, onion, lime juice, cilantro, cumin, chili powder, garlic powder, and salt together in a bowl with a whisk until smooth.
Cover bowl with plastic wrap and refrigerate until chilled, at least 10 minutes.

spaghetti-with-seafood-argiro.name: Spaghetti With Seafood
instructions: First, clean the mussels, pulling their mustache against it and rub the shell with a clean sponge or brush.
We wash them and put them in a colander.
Clean the shrimps, remove the shell and keep the heads together with the body.
Cut the squid into slices.
Boil the pasta in salted water, 2 minutes less than in the package.
Heat the oil in a large deep pan and sauté the onion and the brown garlic on high heat for 2 to 3 minutes.
Add the shripp and squid and sauce for 2 to 3 minutes until they change color.
Add the ouzo and let it evaporate completely.
With a drill spoon remove the shrimps and squid on a plate, cover them and set aside.
Add the tomatoes and mussels.
Cover and place on high heat for 3 to 4 minutes until they open and take their zooms out.
Shake the pan once or twice to make it easier to open.
What they don't open, after we mix them, we remove them and throw them away.
Add the shrimp and squid again.
With tweezers and as they drip, pour the boiled pasta into the sauce.
Pour with some olive oil.
Rub a lot of pepper.
Mix and boil over high heat for 2 to 3 minutes to drink the spaghetti and sauce.
We don't salt until we try.
Fresh mussels are very tasty and usually do not add salt to the cooking.
At the end of cooking, sprinkle finely chopped parsley.
Mix, divide into deep dishes and serve immediately.

spanish-zucchini-omelet-recipe-comedera.name: Spanish Zucchini Omelet Recipe
spanish-zucchini-omelet-recipe-comedera.original_name: Receta de tortilla española de calabacitas
instructions: It purifies the oven at 182 and 3.
En una bandeja para el horno y con papel de horno al fondo, coloca las papas picadas, la calabacita, la cebolla, el ajo.
Add salt and pepper and olive oil.
Mezcla bien procurando que los sabores alcancen a cada trozo de papa y calabacita.
Cover with aluminum paper to make cooking a pair. Hornea at 182 been 3 been for 25 minutes.
En un recipiente grande bate 6 huevos, puedes agregar una pizca de sal.
Incorpora la mezcla  de huevo a las papas con la calabacita y cebolla.
Con la ayuda de una paleta o cuchara, mezcla de forma envolvente para que el huevo se incorpore a todos los vegetales. No lo hagas con mucha fuerza para que la papa y calabacita no se deshagan.
In a frying pan over medium heat, she adds 2 tablespoons of olive oil and when hot she incorporates the egg and potatoes mixture.
Fat and spread the mixture evenly and let cook 4 minutes. If you prefer an omelette a little more dry, leave it 7 minutes.
Con ayuda de un plato grande voltea la tortilla y deja cocinar 4 minutos.
Sirve y disfruta.

spiced-and-glazed-roast-turkey.name: Spiced And Glazed Roast Turkey

ingredients.item: Diamond crystal or  0.25 cup plus 1 0.5 tsp. morton kosher salt
Handful of hardy herbs (such as sage
Sherry vinegar or red wine vinegar

instructions: Place turkey, breast side up, on a cutting board and pat dry. Grip a wing and pull it outward so you can see where it attaches to the body. Using a sharp boning or chef’s knife, cut though the joint to separate the wing from the breast (if you hit bone, you’re in the wrong spot; pull the wing out farther to help you get into the place where the joint meets the socket). Remove wing; repeat on the other side.
Cut through skin connecting 1 leg to carcass. Pull leg back until the ball joint pops out of its socket; cut through the joint to separate leg. Repeat on the other side.

Now for the breast: Position the turkey breast side down with the opening facing you. Using kitchen shears, cut along one side of backbone until you get all the way through the neck end, then turn the turkey 180° and cut through the other side to remove the backbone (save it for making stock).

Very finely grind black and pink peppercorns in a spice mill or mortar and pestle; transfer to a medium bowl. Add salt, garlic powder, onion powder, brown sugar, and paprika and use your fingers to mix together.

Place turkey pieces, skin side up, on a wire rack set inside a rimmed baking sheet. Sprinkle salt mixture liberally all over turkey, patting to adhere. You may not need all of it, but it’s good to have extra since some will end up on the baking sheet. Chill bird, uncovered, at least 24 hours and up to 2 days.

Remove turkey from wire rack and rinse baking sheet and rack if needed (turkey will most likely release some liquid). Line baking sheet with 3 layers of foil to make cleanup easy and set rack back inside. Arrange turkey pieces on rack, skin side up, and let sit at room temperature 2–3 hours to help decrease the cooking time.

Meanwhile, cook herbs, garlic, orange zest, soy sauce, brown sugar, and vinegar in a small saucepan over medium heat, stirring occasionally, until sugar is dissolved and glaze thickens slightly (it should just barely coat a spoon), 10–12 minutes. Remove glaze from heat.

Place a rack in middle of oven; preheat to 425°. Rub turkey with oil and pour 1 cup water into baking sheet. Roast turkey, rotating baking sheet halfway through, until skin is mostly golden brown, 20–25 minutes. Reduce oven temperature to 300° and continue to roast turkey, brushing with glaze every 20 minutes and adding more water by ½-cupfuls as needed to maintain some liquid in baking sheet, until an instant-read thermometer inserted into the thickest part of breast registers 150°, and 170° when inserted into the thickest part of the thighs, 50–70 minutes longer (total cooking time will be 1–1½ hours). Skin should be deep golden brown and shiny. Transfer turkey to a cutting board; tent loosely with foil. Let rest 30–60 minutes before carving.

spiced-lamb-meatballs.name: Spiced Lamb Meatballs

ingredients.item: Whole 2-inch dried chipotle chile or 2 teaspoons ground chipotle chiles

instructions: Preheat broiler. Stir first 3 ingredients in a small dry skillet over medium heat until aromatic and slightly darker in color, about 2 minutes. Let cool; transfer to spice mill. Place chile on a baking sheet and broil, watching closely to prevent burning, just until it begins to puff up, about 1 minute. Cut chile in half; discard seeds and stem. Add chile (or ground chipotle chiles) to spice mill with toasted seeds; finely grind together.
Meanwhile, place potato in a small saucepan; add cold water to cover. Bring to a boil; reduce heat and simmer until just cooked through, about 10 minutes. Finely grate potato into a large bowl.
Add chile mixture, ground lamb, and next 4 ingredients to bowl; mix with your hands until well combined. Form mixture into tablespoon-size (1"-diameter) meatballs.
Heat oil in a large nonstick skillet over medium heat. Cook meatballs, turning occasionally, until golden all over and cooked through, 10–12 minutes.

spiced-zucchini-bread.name: Spiced Zucchini Bread

ingredients.item: Chopped lightly toasted walnuts or pecans

instructions: Preheat the oven to 163°C, and grease two 8x4×2 1/2-inch loaf pans.

In the bowl of an electric mixer, beat the eggs until foamy. Add the vegetable oil, sugar, zucchini, and vanilla extract and mix well. Add the flour, cinnamon, baking soda, salt, and baking powder, and mix until well blended. Stir in the nuts. Divide the batter evenly between the prepared loaf pans, and tap them gently on the counter to release any air bubbles.

Bake until the loaves have risen and are golden brown and a tester inserted into the center comes out clean, 55–60 minutes. Allow the bread to cool in the pans for 5 minutes; then turn the loaves out onto wire racks to cool.
Serve the bread warm, sliced and spread with cream cheese if desired.

spicy-cabbage-salad-with-turkey-and-pean.name: Spicy Cabbage Salad With Turkey And Peanuts

ingredients.item: Head of green or savoy cabbage

ingredients.prep: thinly sliced on a diagonal, plus  0.5 cup celery leaves
green parts only, thinly sliced on a diagonal

instructions: Toss cabbage and ½ tsp. salt in a large bowl. Massage vigorously with your hands until cabbage begins to release water and soften, about 2 minutes (this will both season and tenderize the leaves). Drain; set aside.

Mix anchovies, lemon zest, lemon juice, vinegar, soy sauce, miso, and sugar in a large bowl; whisk in oil. Add cabbage, celery and celery leaves, scallions, chile, cilantro, and turkey meat to bowl and toss to combine; season with salt.
Serve salad topped with peanuts and sesame seeds.
Do Ahead: Dressing can be made 1 day ahead. Cover and chill. Rewhisk before using.

spicy-chorizo-pasta.name: Spicy Chorizo Pasta
instructions: Heat the oil in the pan, dice red onion and put in the pan.
Chop chorizo into pieces approx 5mm in size. Add to the pan with onions.
Add balsamic and  saute for 5 mins until chorizo starts to crisp.
Add the wine and tabasco.
Cook pasta separately according to box directions.
Season the pan to taste, then add pasta and stir together.
Serve hot and enjoy!

spicy-marinated-vegetables-and-sardines-.name: Spicy Marinated Vegetables And Sardines On Toast

ingredients.item: A spice mill or mortar and pestle

instructions: Preheat oven to 218°C. Toast coriander and fennel seeds in a dry small skillet over medium heat, tossing often, until fragrant, about 2 minutes; let cool. Coarsely grind in spice mill or with mortar and pestle; transfer to a medium bowl.

Using a mandoline, shave carrots, shallots, and chile into thin rounds; transfer to bowl with spices. Add vinegar and season with salt. Using your hands, massage mixture 20–30 seconds (this is just to get the flavors to meld faster). Let sit 10 minutes.
Shave radishes on mandoline into bowl with carrot mixture and add 2 Tbsp. oil. Toss to combine and let vegetables sit another 5–10 minutes.

Meanwhile, tear baguette halves into 4" pieces and place on a baking sheet. Drizzle with oil and bake until golden brown and edges are lightly charred, 5–8 minutes. Remove toast from oven and rub cut sides with garlic; season lightly with salt. Spread a layer of mayonnaise over each toast. Top with a few sardines, then drained vegetables. Finely grate a bit of lemon zest over each.

spiked-grasshopper-milkshake.name: Spiked Grasshopper Milkshake

ingredients.item: Miniature bittersweet or semisweet chocolate chips

instructions: Preheat oven to 350°. Whisk flour, chocolate chips, cocoa powder, salt, and baking powder in a medium bowl. Using an electric mixer on medium speed, beat butter, sugar, and vanilla in a large bowl until light and fluffy, about 4 minutes. Reduce speed to low and mix in dry ingredients until just incorporated, about 1 minute. Transfer dough to a large piece of plastic wrap and shape into a 1–1¼" thick log. Wrap tightly; chill until firm, 1–1 ½ hours.

Slice dough crosswise into ¼–⅓" thick rounds and arrange on a parchment-lined baking sheet, spacing ½–1" apart. Bake, rotating baking sheets halfway through, until tops and sides are firm and dry to the touch, 16–20 minutes. Let cool.
Do Ahead: Cookies can be baked 3 days ahead. Store airtight at room temperature.
Purée ice cream, milk, and both liqueurs in a blender until smooth. Transfer to a small bowl or airtight container; cover and freeze until shake has returned to a thick consistency, about 2 hours.
Coarsely crush 5 or 6 cookies (you should have about ½ cup) and stir into shake. Serve in chilled glasses.
Do Ahead: Shake can be made 4 hours ahead. Keep frozen, stirring occasionally and removing from freezer if needed to keep it from freezing solid.

spinach-and-cheese-quiche-lezzet.name: Spinach And Cheese Quiche
instructions: 1. Roast the onion from piyazluk to pinkish in olive oil.
2. Add the spinachs finely and cook until you pull the water.
3. Salt, pepper, add pepper and cool pepper.
4. Add and mix the cheese to the spinach.
5. The materials for dough knead in a wide container.
6. Oiled paper cool on the bottom of the cake mold with clamp.
7. Place the dough with roller on the lightly unified floor and the edges into the mold will be high.
8. Curl the spinach mortar on the dough or on the edges.
9. Cook until the oven, set to 180 degrees.
10. Serve.
11.  Afiyet olsun.
12. Take a look at the recipe of vegetables with a different version.

spinach-feta-brownies.name: Spinach Feta Brownies
instructions: Preheat the oven to 191°C (190 degrees C). Use about 1 tablespoon of the melted butter to grease a 7x11-inch baking dish.

Heat olive oil in a non-stick skillet over medium heat. Add onions to the hot oil and cook, stirring frequently, until onions are soft and beginning to turn clear, 3 to 4 minutes. Remove skillet from heat and add spinach. Stir spinach into the onions, breaking up any large clumps.
Stir together flour, baking powder, and salt in a large bowl.

Combine milk and eggs in a small bowl, whisking until milk and eggs are fully incorporated. Drizzle in remaining melted butter, while continuing to stir. Add to flour mixture and stir until there are no lumps.

Fold in spinach mixture, French herbs, feta cheese, and mozzarella. Do not over-mix. Pour into the prepared dish, using a spatula to smooth and level the surface. Sprinkle grated Pecorino Romano evenly over the top.
Bake in the center of the preheated oven until the top is browned, 40 to 45 minutes. Test for doneness with a wooden pick inserted into the middle. The dish is done, if the pick comes out clean.
Allow to cool for 10 to 15 minutes.
Cut into 18 brownies and garnish with fresh parsley to serve.

spinach-matzo-balls.name: Spinach Matzo Balls

ingredients.item: Matzo ball mix (usually both bags out of a box).

instructions: In a medium bowl whisk the eggs and the oil.
In the bowl of a food processor fitted with a metal blade, process the spinach until puréed. Squeeze the water out of the spinach.
Add the spinach purée into the egg mixture. Whisk to incorporate.
Sprinkle in 1 cup (2 bags) of the matzo ball mix. Stir in with a fork, mixing as little as possible. Don't overwork it. Chill in freezer for 20 minutes.
Meanwhile, bring a pot of water or chicken stock to a boil.

Wet your hands in a bowl of cold water. Using your hand, and manipulating as little as possible, scoop out a ping-pong-ball size of the mixture. Form into a ball with your fingertips, using no real pressure. Bring the water down to a simmer. Drop the balls into the water. Cover the pot and simmer for 20 minutes.

spinach-watermelon-salad.name: Spinach Watermelon Salad
instructions: Whisk olive oil, white balsamic vinegar, and salt together in a small bowl; set aside.
Combine arugula, spinach, onions, and tomatoes in a large salad bowl. Drizzle vinaigrette over salad mixture; toss to coat. Add feta cheese and watermelon to serve.

spinach-yogurt-dip.name: Spinach Yogurt Dip
instructions: Add the Greek yogurt and feta cheese to a food processor. Process until fully combined and mostly smooth.
Add the spinach, parsley, mint, Frank’s Red Hot Original, lemon zest and juice, and goat cheese. Continue to process until everything is broken down and creamy, about 1 minute.
Serve with chips or pretzels.
Enjoy!

spring-greens-and-leek-gratin-epicurious.name: Spring Greens And Leek Gratin | Epicurious

ingredients.prep: white and light green parts only, thinly sliced
bulbs thinly sliced, greens coarsely chopped (or 3 large garlic cloves, thinly sliced)
crusts removed, torn into irregular 1/2" pieces (about 3 cups torn bread)

instructions: Preheat oven to 177°C. Melt butter in an ovenproof 10" skillet (such as cast iron) over medium-low heat. Add leeks and ramp bulbs and cook, stirring often, until leeks are softened, about 10 minutes. (Try to keep the leeks from browning.)

Add ramp greens, arugula, and spinach in big handfuls, cooking and wilting one batch before adding the next. (At first it will look like all those greens will never fit in the skillet, but keep at it—you’ll see!) When all greens are wilted (this may take 15–20 minutes), add coriander, salt, and cayenne. Cook, stirring, until spices are incorporated, about 1 minute. Add lemon zest, cream, and 1/2 cup Parmesan. Continue to cook, stirring, until cream has slightly reduced, about 2 minutes longer. Remove from heat.

Toss bread with oil in a large bowl to coat. Arrange bread on top of vegetables, taking care not to cover the greens completely (you want them to peek through here and there). Sprinkle remaining 2 Tbsp. Parmesan over.
Transfer to oven and bake gratin until bread is golden brown and crisp, cheese is melted, and cream is bubbling, 35–45 minutes. Let cool slightly before serving.

spring-greens-and-shaved-celery-salad.name: Spring Greens And Shaved Celery Salad

ingredients.prep: shaved with a mandoline or very thinly sliced, plus 1/4 cup celery leaves

instructions: Whisk together shallot, oil, and vinegar in a large bowl; season with salt and pepper. Add celery stalks and leaves and arugula; toss to coat. Garnish with olives and cheese, if desired.

squid-stuffed-with-minced-meat-teleculin.name: Squid Stuffed With Minced Meat
instructions: To prepare this recipe, fix the squid, remove and cut the tentacles into small pieces and season them with lemon juice.

Peel and wash the onions and garlic teeth and pinch them finely. Remove the skin from the sausage and pinch it in the chipper. Lay down the tentacles for a bowl, add the minced meat, a chopped onion, the sausage and chopped parsley, season with pyri and mix very well. Then fill the squid with the mixture and stick it with sticks.

Light a pot with olive oil, let it warm, add the other onion, garlic, tomato pulp, blond leaf, a branch of parsley and squid and let it cook, in mild heat, until the squid is soft. Water with some water if necessary, correct the seasonings, remove from the fire and serve decorated to taste. You can go with white rice or, if you prefer, mashed potatoes.

stacked-muffuletta-salad.name: Stacked Muffuletta Salad
instructions: Heat 2 Tbsp. extra-virgin olive oil in a small skillet over medium-high. Cook ½ cup panko, stirring often, until golden brown, 1–2 minutes. Transfer to a small bowl and mix in a pinch of kosher salt. Set panko aside.

Mix 1 garlic clove, finely grated, 1 cup store-bought olive salad, finely chopped, ¼ cup white wine vinegar, 3 Tbsp. mayonnaise, 2 tsp. honey, 1 tsp. Calabrian chile paste, ½ tsp. dried oregano, and remaining ¼ cup extra-virgin olive oil in a medium bowl; season dressing with freshly ground pepper (you won’t need to salt because of how salty the ingredients are).

Trim stem end from 1 large head of iceberg lettuce, discard. Cut head crosswise with a serrated knife into 1"-thick slabs (you should have 4). Place bottom slab in a large, wide shallow bowl. Drizzle with some dressing, then layer about a third of 4 oz. thinly sliced mortadella, coarsely chopped, a third of 4 oz. thinly sliced provolone cheese, coarsely chopped, and a third of 3 oz. thinly sliced salami, coarsely chopped, on top. Finely grate some ½ oz. Parmesan over. Repeat layering process two more times, dividing remaining mortadella, provolone cheese, and salami in half. Top with final lettuce slice, cut side down (it should make a rounded “hat”). Spoon any remaining dressing around base of salad. Top salad “hat” with reserved panko and finely grate remaining Parmesan over; season with pepper.

stacys-half-cup-sweet-potato-casserole.name: Stacy's Half Cup Sweet Potato Casserole
instructions: Preheat an oven to 177°C (175 degrees C).
Mix the flour, brown sugar, oats, and cinnamon together in a bowl; cut the butter into the mixture until crumbled.

Combine the yams and cranberries in a larger bowl. Stir 1 cup of the flour mixture into the yams and cranberries; pour the mixture into the bottom of an 8-inch square baking dish and top with the remaining flour mixture.
Bake in the preheated oven for 25 minutes; top with the marshmallows and return to the oven until the marshmallows are browned, about 10 minutes more.

steak-with-stout-pan-sauce.name: Steak With Stout Pan Sauce
instructions: Spread 1 teaspoon mustard over steaks; sprinkle with salt and ground black pepper. Heat 1 teaspoon oil in large nonstick skillet over medium-high heat. Cook meat about 4 minutes per side for medium-rare. Transfer to plate; tent with foil. Wipe out skillet.

Mash butter and flour in small bowl; set aside. Heat 1 teaspoon oil in same skillet over medium-high heat. Add garlic; sauté 15 to 20 seconds. Add broth; bring to boil. Whisk in stout, brown sugar, soy sauce, 3 teaspoons mustard, and butter mixture. Boil until reduced to 2/3 cup, 2 to 3 minutes.
Thinly slice steaks; divide among plates. Drizzle sauce over and serve.

strawberries-sauteed-with-goat-cheese-an.name: Strawberries Sautéed With Goat Cheese And Port Wine
strawberries-sauteed-with-goat-cheese-an.original_name: Morangos salteados com queijo de cabra e vinho do Porto
instructions: Wash the strawberries, cut them into coarse pieces and then salt them in a frying pan with the hot olive oil.
Add the goat cheese, cut into pieces, and the chopped chives, season with salt and pepper and wrap.
Por fim, refresque com o vinho do porto e deixe fervilhar. Retire do lume, transfira para um prato, polvilhe com as nozes e sirva.

strawberry-conserve.name: Strawberry Conserve
instructions: Combine all ingredients in a heavy, wide pot. Cover; let sit at room temperature, stirring occasionally, for 2 hours. (The berries will ooze and sugar will dissolve.)

Bring strawberry mixture to a simmer over medium heat. Cook, stirring gently, until strawberries are just tender, about 3 minutes. Using a slotted spoon, transfer strawberries to 1 pint jar. Continue simmering liquid until it thickens into a syrupy consistency, 1-2 minutes. Discard lemon peel and pour syrup over strawberries; seal and let cool to room temperature. Chill for up to 1 month.

strawberry-kiwi-sangria-ice-pops.name: Strawberry Kiwi Sangria Ice Pops
instructions: In a blender, combine the strawberries, 1 cup (180 g) kiwi, wine, lemonade, and vodka and blend until smooth.
Place 1 slice of kiwi in each ice pop mold.
Pour the mixture into the ice pop molds, seal with the lids, and add the ice pop sticks.
Freeze until solid, at least 4 hours, or overnight.
Carefully remove the ice pops from the molds.
Enjoy!

strawberry-pancakes-lezzet.name: Strawberry Pancakes
instructions: 1. For Crepe, eggs, milk, melted butter and vanilla breeze in a large bowl of Veccedil;ırp.
2. Add powder sugar and flax and purulent mortarmix push with a spatula help to achieve.
3. Harç from a pan that you have light fat; from a kepç to broadcast.
4. All mortar repeat the same process until the end.
5. Take the cream and powder sugar in a large mixing container.
6. With the help of a mixer until lightly joins the cream &l;
7. Between.
8. On place slices and close to triangle.
9. Pure fortune powder sugar.

strawberry-tart-with-basil-teleculinaria.name: Strawberry Tart With Basil
instructions: Wash and cut the strawberries. Take a pan to the fire with 300 g of strawberries, sugar and water and let it boil, in mild heat, for 10 minutes. Remove, crush and let it cool. Reserve.
Place 150 g of strawberries in a bowl, add condensed milk, cream and eggs, crush and reserve.

Stretch the leafy dough and place it in a (24 cm in diameter) shape of removable background, lined with vegetable paper. Pinch the dough with a fork and bring it to the oven, preheated at 200oC, for 20 minutes. Remove.
Verta o preparado dos morangos e das natas sobre a tarte e leve novamente ao forno, durante 30 minutos. Retire, deixe arrefecer e desenforme.
Have the strawberry candy and strawberries in pieces over the pie, sprinkle it with chopped basil and take it to the fridge until serving.

strawberry-rhubarb-salad-with-mint-and-h.name: Strawberry-rhubarb Salad With Mint And Hazelnuts
instructions: Preheat oven to 350°. Toast hazelnuts on a rimmed baking sheet, tossing occasionally, until golden brown, 8–10 minutes. Let cool, then chop.

Meanwhile, toss rhubarb, sugar, Cointreau, and lemon juice in a medium bowl. Let sit until rhubarb is slightly softened and releases its juices, about 30 minutes. Toss with strawberries, mint, and hazelnuts.

stroganoff-recipe-teleculinaria.name: Stroganoff Recipe

ingredients.item: 700 g   de peito de frango cortado para strogonoff
Arroz branco cozido e batata-palha para acompanhar

instructions: Take a medium torch with olive oil, onion and garlic, peeled and chopped, and let it saute until golden. Then add the chicken and let it brown for about 5 minutes.

Adicione a manteiga e as folhas de louro, tempere com sal e pimenta e mexa por mais 3 minutos. Junte o ketchup e a mostarda, e deixe cozinhar por mais 4 minutos. Acrescente as natas, mexa, baixe o lume e deixe cozinhar por mais 10 minutos. Retifique os temperos e retire.
Acompanhe o strogonoff com arroz branco cozido e batata-palha, decore com cebolinho picado e sirva de seguida.

stuffed-zucchini-flowers-lezzet.name: Stuffed Zucchini Flowers

ingredients.item: Dereotu (up to three of one bundle)

instructions: 1. Dry onions cube chop.
2. From the middle to split and tip rende the parts of pearl with fine part.
3. Spread the derecile leaves in your hands.
4. Pumpkin Pisdescribe the green parts in the parts of the leaves without damage to the leaves
5. Without pieces of leaves, take yellow in the hollow.
6. Half of the olive oil to a large pot pouring your oil to dry onions in this oil until the color area.
7. Wash Rice and roasting with onions.
8. D&uuml, adding salt, dry mint and hot water together with grated tomatoes, cook with stirring up to water &ccedil in fire.
9. Sosun sitting inner add a short time after resting, add alive dereot and shield thoroughly.
10. You are ready to fill the tribute to the interior of the part of the azar, the content at the level that will not be poisoned.
11. 11. 11. 11. Flowers for interiorscribe to the pot in order to carefully fold and stay at the bottom of the floor.
12. Discover the remaining olive oil in the pot and add warm water to the half of the frosts.
12. August Close the cover of the pot and cook for 30 minutes in the jealous fire of pumpkin
14 July You can fortune your desired with lemon slices as warm or cold.
15.  Afiyet olsun.

sucuk-and-sausage-in-pita-lezzet.name: Sucuk And Sausage In Pita
instructions: 1. Take flour, salt, carbonate, water and dissolved warm butter to dough kneading container.
2. Smooth dough knead.
3. Cover over 30 minutes.
4. Cut the dough into 4 equal glands.
5. Open the clothes with roles and cook two-sidedsided in the pressed teflon pan.
6. Peel tomatoes and chop them in the form of cube.
7. Clean onions and shore.
8. 2 tablespoons of olive oil in the pan and so on.
9.  Domatesi ekleyip kavurun.
10. Taste salt and pepper, and cook until you thoroughly attract water.
11. 11. Cook in the grill or barbecue to the remaining olive oil of sausages and sausages.
12. Share tomato sauce on pides and add sausages and sausages.
12. August Fold the pide into two.
14 July For Pesto sauce, peel garlic.
15. Clean and clean Maydanoz and dereotonu.
16. Crush Maydanoz, dereotu, bake cheese, olive oil, walnut, garlic, powder red pepper and salt in the robot.
17. September Serve with Pide.

summer-squash-and-red-quinoa-salad-with-.name: Summer Squash And Red Quinoa Salad With Walnuts

ingredients.item: Kosher salt plus more for seasoning
Finely grated parmesan plus 1/4 cup shaved with a peeler

instructions: Bring quinoa and 4 cups water to a boil in a medium saucepan. Season with salt, cover, reduce heat to medium-low, and simmer until quinoa is tender but not mushy, 12–15 minutes. Drain; return quinoa to hot saucepan. Cover and let sit for 15 minutes. Uncover; fluff with a fork and let cool.

Cut squash into 1/8"-thick slices, some lengthwise and some crosswise. Transfer to a large bowl, season with 2 tsp. salt, and toss to coat. Let sit until slightly wilted, about 15 minutes. Rinse under cold water and drain well. Pat dry with paper towels.
Whisk grated Parmesan, zest, juice, and vinegar in a medium bowl. Gradually whisk in oil. Season dressing with salt and pepper.
Combine squash, quinoa, parsley, walnuts, and basil in a large bowl. Pour dressing over; toss to coat. Garnish with shaved Parmesan.

summery-black-eyed-pea-salad.name: Summery Black-eyed Pea Salad

ingredients.item: Salt and ground black pepper to taste

instructions: Mix black-eyed peas, celery, bell peppers, onion, and cilantro together in a bowl.
Whisk olive oil, lemon juice, garlic, garlic powder, salt, and pepper together in a separate bowl. Toss dressing into beans and vegetables.
For best flavor, refrigerate for at least 4 hours before serving.

sunday-morning-surprise.name: Sunday Morning Surprise
instructions: Preheat oven to 177°C (175 degrees C). Grease the bottom and sides of a 2-quart baking dish with cooking spray.

Pull crescent roll dough out of the can; slice dough into 1/2-inch pieces. Arrange over the bottom of the baking dish. Sprinkle brown sugar and cinnamon on top. Drop teaspoonfuls of the Neufchatel cheese on top.
Whisk eggs and milk together in a small bowl. Pour into the baking dish.
Bake in the preheated oven until the center is set, 40 to 50 minutes.

super-oven-baked-garlic-parmesan-fries.name: Super Oven-baked Garlic-parmesan Fries

ingredients.prep: or more to taste, sliced into even strips

instructions: Preheat the oven to 218°C (220 degrees C). Line a baking sheet with parchment paper.
Pour olive oil into a large resealable plastic bag and add potatoes. Seal the bag and shake to coat every piece with oil.
Combine Parmesan cheese, garlic powder, onion powder, paprika, salt, and pepper in a second resealable bag. Pour oiled potatoes into the bag, seal, and toss well to coat.
Spread potatoes on the prepared baking sheet.
Bake in the preheated oven for 15 minutes. Flip potatoes over and bake until crisp on the outside and soft on the inside, about 15 minutes more.

swedish-hallongrottor-cookies-raspberry-.name: Swedish Hallongrottor Cookies (raspberry Caves)
instructions: Preheat the oven to 177°C (175 degrees C). Line a 16-cup muffin tin with muffin liners.
Beat butter and sugar together in a large bowl using an electric mixer until creamy. Add flour, vanilla sugar, and baking powder; beat to combine.

Divide dough in half and divide each half into 8 equal pieces. Roll each piece into a ball. Place a ball of dough into each prepared muffin cup; make a small indentation in the center of each dough ball with a flour-coated thumb. Fill each indentation with a teaspoon of raspberry jam.
Bake in the preheated oven until lightly golden brown, about 20 minutes.

sweet-and-savory-broccoli-salad.name: Sweet And Savory Broccoli Salad
instructions: Prepare the salad: Cook bacon in a large skillet and over medium-high heat, turning occasionally, until crisp, about 10 minutes. Drain bacon slices on paper towels and crumble once cooled.
Mix bacon, broccoli, red onion, raisins, and cashews together in a large bowl.
Make the dressing: Whisk mayonnaise, brown sugar, and vinegar together in a separate bowl.
Toss together: Drizzle dressing over the broccoli mixture in small amounts, mixing the salad between additions to coat evenly.

sweet-chocolate-bread-with-hazelnuts-arg.name: Sweet Chocolate Bread With Hazelnuts

ingredients.item: 2 cups whole flour mixed with carob flour
4 tablespoons of stevia or other sweetening matter
2 cups whole flour mixed with carob flour
4 tablespoons of stevia or other sweetening matter

instructions: We start the sweet bread with chocolate, sifting in a large bowl the flour with the baking powder.
Add the salt and sweetener and mix with a spoon.
In another bowl, beat the egg with a fork and add the milk and corn oil.
We make a puddle of flour, pour the liquid ingredients into the solids and mix the mixture (it will resemble the cake dough).
Finally, add the chopped chocolate and hazelnuts.
Butter well and flour a small long cake form and pour the mixture in.

sweet-and-sour-brussels-sprouts.name: Sweet-and-sour Brussels Sprouts

ingredients.item: Kosher salt and freshly ground black pepper
White soy sauce or reduced-sodium soy sauce
Aleppo pepper or  0.25 crushed red pepper flakes

instructions: Preheat oven to 400°. Toss brussels sprouts and 3 Tbsp. oil on a rimmed baking sheet; season with salt and pepper. Roast, tossing halfway through, until softened and cut sides are brown, 20–25 minutes.

Whisk vinegar, sugar, fish sauce, soy sauce, and remaining 1 Tbsp. oil in a large bowl. Add brussels sprouts and toss to coat; transfer to a platter. Top with pumpkin seeds and rosemary; sprinkle with Aleppo pepper.
DO AHEAD: Vinaigrette can be made 1 day ahead. Cover and chill.
